summary: Store Profile and Public Review Page testing complete. Backend APIs fully functional (14/14 tests pass). Public Review page works perfectly. Store Profile page has a state hydration issue specific to Expo web when navigating directly to the URL - Zustand state resets on navigation.

minor.issue: Was returning 520 error due to missing pytz module - FIXED by installing pytz

ui_bugs.issue: ScrollView was not imported but used in component
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Added ScrollView to react-native imports

ui_bugs.issue: Store Profile page shows 'No store associated with your account' when navigating directly via URL. Zustand state resets on page navigation in Expo web.
ui_bugs.root_cause: Zustand store state doesn't persist across page navigations in Expo web. localStorage has correct data but Zustand state is reset.

integration_issues.issue: Zustand store reinitializes on navigation, losing auth state despite localStorage having correct data
integration_issues.suggested_fix: Use zustand/middleware persist to automatically hydrate state from localStorage, or add sync mechanism between localStorage and Zustand on page load

action_items: PRIORITY: Add zustand persist middleware to authStore to automatically hydrate from AsyncStorage on page load
Or: Modify loadAuth in _layout.tsx to be awaited before rendering children
The User interface in authStore.ts was missing store_id, organization_id, role - already fixed
critical_code_review_comments: store-profile.tsx: Added authLoading check and user?.store_id dependency to useEffect
authStore.ts: User interface was missing store_id, organization_id, role fields - fixed
inbox.tsx: ScrollView was used but not imported - fixed by adding ScrollView to imports
public_review.py: pytz module not installed - fixed by pip install pytz and adding to requirements.txt
authStore.ts: Consider adding zustand persist middleware for automatic state hydration

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Public Review page works, Store Profile has state hydration issue

seed_data_creation: Updated superadmin user to have store_id: 699637981b07c23426a5324a
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for Store Profile and Public Review are working correctly (14/14 tests pass). Public Review page at /review/ken-garff-honda-downtown works perfectly including feedback submission. Store Profile page at /settings/store-profile has a Zustand state hydration issue - the store resets on page navigation even though localStorage has correct data. Fix requires adding zustand persist middleware to authStore.

public_review_page.review_links_display: PASS - Google and Yelp links shown
public_review_page.feedback_form: PASS - Form submission works with Thank You message

store_profile_page.frontend_display: PARTIAL - Works after login but state resets on direct navigation

login_flow.status: PASS - Login works correctly, localStorage receives store_id and role

noted: None - all APIs are real and functional

rca_of_issue.issue: Store Profile shows 'No store associated' on direct navigation
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Zustand store initializes with isLoading: true and user: null. On page navigation in Expo web, the Zustand store reinitializes, losing the previous state. loadAuth() is called but by the time it completes, store-profile.tsx has already rendered with null user.
rca_of_issue.evidence: localStorage contains correct store_id after login, but useAuthStore().user is null on initial render of store-profile page
rca_of_issue.mitigation: 1. Add zustand persist middleware to automatically sync with AsyncStorage, 2. Or block rendering until loadAuth completes in _layout.tsx
